ohtani.title: Teoscar Hernández fuels Dodgers' win with grand slam
ohtani.blurb: Teoscar Hernández provides all the runs needed with a go-ahead grand slam in the Dodgers' 4-3 win over the Padres

imanaga.title: JJ Wetherholt's leadoff home run fuels Cardinals' win
imanaga.blurb: JJ Wetherholt's leadoff home run and Kyle Leahy's six strikeouts fuel Cardinals' 3-0 victory over the Cubs

suzuki.title: JJ Wetherholt's leadoff home run fuels Cardinals' win
suzuki.blurb: JJ Wetherholt's leadoff home run and Kyle Leahy's six strikeouts fuel Cardinals' 3-0 victory over the Cubs

yoshida.title: Willson Contreras hits three-run homer in win
yoshida.blurb: Willson Contreras hits three-run home run and Caleb Durbin hits a solo home run in the Red Sox's 6-3 win over the Nationals

okamoto.title: Gilbert, Arozarena shine in Mariners' 11-0 win
okamoto.blurb: Logan Gilbert allows just one hit in a scoreless start, plus Randy Arozarena hits a grand slam in the Mariners' 11-0 win over the Blue Jays

murakami.title: Miguel Vargas hits a walk-off homer in White Sox win
murakami.blurb: Miguel Vargas hits a walk-off homer in the 10th inning and Rikuu Nishida collects his first RBI in the White Sox 4-3 win over the Tigers

matsui.title: Craig Stammen recaps loss to Dodgers
matsui.blurb: Craig Stammen discusses bullpen usage, not being able to score late in the game, this tough mathup against the Dodgers and more after loss
